en: If your company is required to comply with Belgium's Social Security requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).

The Certificate of No Social Security Arrears can be obtained through the National Social Security Office (NSSO) online platform. It serves as an official certificate that confirms a company has no outstanding social security contributions.\n

Is your company required to comply with Belgium's Social Security requirements as regulated by the National Social Security Office (NSSO/ONSS) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Belgium's Social Security requirements.

The company operates as a sole proprietorship with no additional employees. It contributes to the social insurance fund for self-employed individuals and is prepared to provide supporting documentation upon request.
The company does not have any employees in Belgium.

The company has foreign employee(s) working temporarily (less than 24 months) in Belgium that are covered by the home country's scheme and are prepared to provide a copy of the A1 certificate(s) upon request.
